title: The Gold Racket
director: Louis J. Gasnier, Joseph H. Lewis
writer: Howard Higgin, David S. Levy, Griffin Jay
actors: Conrad Nagel, Eleanor Hunt, Fuzzy Knight
plot: At the request of the Mexican government, a federal agent and a lady reporter team up to catch a gang that has been smuggling gold from Mexico to the U.S. and then selling it to the U.S. government.
